LAW AND MOTION 302, EFENDANT CF CONTRACTING, INC. AND JACOB FRIEDMAN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. THIS CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO MARIN COUNTY. PLAINTIFF MARGARET MCMAHON MUST PAY ALL TRANSFER FEES. MS. MCMAHON STIPULATED TO TRANSFER THIS CASE TO MARIN COUNTY. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS PER CCP 396B(B) IS DENIED BECAUSE MS. MCMAHON HAD A GOOD FAITH BASIS FOR FILING THIS LAWSUIT IN SAN FRANCISCO. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CF CONTRACTING, INC. and JACOB FRIEDMAN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is granted. This case is transferred to Marin County. Plaintiff Margaret McMahon must pay all transfer fees. Ms. McMahon stipulated to transfer this case to Marin County. Defendants' request for fees and costs per CCP 396b(b) is denied because Ms. McMahon had a good faith basis for filing this lawsuit in San Francisco. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Kate Svinarich of the law offices of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell (415-956-2828) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The mopving party withdraws the moption as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

DEFENDANTS CF CONTRACTING, INC. and JACOB FRIEDMAN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is OFF CALENDAR without prejudice to re-filing and notice.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
